data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a hard block if required forms are missing. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this requirement, nor is there any indication that the system enforces a hard block in the absence of required forms. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but without concrete evidence of its implementation, it constitutes a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of hard block enforcement when required forms are missing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement hard block validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the system blocks booking if required forms are not signed.
